71 E1K E1K_INSOMINA 21k(E1k)Insomnia/Change in Sleeping Pattern CHAR 1 Indicates the frequency of the patient's insomnia or a change in sleeping pattern. Examples include difficulty fallin asleep, fewr or more hours of sleep than usual, waking up too early and unable to fall back to sleep. -1 = Unknown, -2 = Space, 0 = Indicator not exhitied in last 30 days, 1 = Indicator of this type exhibited
